title: Platantheroides floribunda

It is part of the tribe Orchideae and the subtribe Orchidinae. The genus Platantheroides is closely related to the genus Platanthera, but it is considered a distinct and separate genus. The classification of Platantheroides floribunda is also supported by its unique characteristics, such as its growth habit and flower morphology. Further studies and research may continue to refine our understanding of the classification of this species.

It has been traditionally used in medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, coughs, and respiratory problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties.
